subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Lord! In the days when the Orb of the horizons dawned forth from the East of 'Iráq with its resplendent rays [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده پروردگار در ایامیکه نیر آفاق از مشرق عراق طلوع نمود و باشعه ساطعه
subcodes.subjects: @special knowledge of the Manifestation of God, @universality of the Cause, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God
